evals.prompt: Validate my bundle: deploy-to-k8s, helm-chart-review, api-security-review.
evals.expected_output: A JSON array of findings categorized by severity (error, warning, info) covering dependency completeness, redundancy, and tool coverage.
assertions: The output is valid JSON containing an array of finding objects
Each finding includes severity, title, detail, and affected_skills fields
Severity values are one of: error, warning, info
Missing dependencies are flagged as error severity
The analysis checks DEPENDS_ON relationships for completeness

evals.prompt: Check if document-reviewer and code-review are redundant in my bundle.
evals.expected_output: An analysis of the SIMILAR_TO score between the two skills, flagging potential redundancy if similarity exceeds 0.85.
assertions: The response includes a similarity score or assessment between the two skills
Redundancy is flagged as warning severity if similarity is high
The finding explains why the skills may or may not be redundant
The affected_skills array includes both skill names

evals.prompt: I have a bundle with just one skill: deploy-to-k8s. What am I missing?
evals.expected_output: Findings that identify missing dependencies and capability gaps for a single-skill bundle.
assertions: Missing dependencies of deploy-to-k8s are flagged as errors
Capability gaps or missing complementary skills are identified
The response uses get_skill_dependencies to check the dependency tree
At least one finding has error severity for missing dependencies
